notes: v245 — Two refinements. The Signals column now says '— none' (with an explanation on hover) instead of a bare dash when a share simply has no flags right now — dashes made healthy screens look broken; flags only ever appear when a scan detects accumulation, block trades, sharp moves or unusual end-of-day patterns. And screen-fitting gets a second stage: if tightening the table isn't enough, it also folds away the tick-box and Range columns until there's room — they come straight back when you widen the window or hide the side panel.
